name_en: !N40471 White Check Silk-Print Nautical Collection Shopping Bag Series NEVERFULL This Neverfull Medium Handbag is crafted from Damier Azur coated canvas, featuring a dazzling nautical print woven from rope and chain motifs, infusing new life into the classic checkerboard pattern. Tighten or loosen the side straps to switch between a sharp and a relaxed style. Dimensions: 31 x 28 x 14 cm D
